name: search_messages
description: Allows the user to search through existing messages or conversations.
parameters: {'search_query': 'What message or keyword do you want to search for?'}

name: open_account_settings
description: Opens the account and settings menu for the signed-in user.

name: open_conversation
description: Opens a selected conversation to view or send messages.
parameters: {'conversation_name': 'Which conversation do you want to open?'}

name: start_new_chat
description: Starts a new chat with a contact or phone number.
parameters: {'recipient': 'Who do you want to start a chat with?'}

name: open_gemini_chat
description: Opens the Gemini chat assistant for AI-powered messaging.
